description_long: This object is a modern flat-panel computer monitor with a wide, rectangular display and a slim profile. The front surface is dominated by a smooth, uninterrupted screen framed by a thin bezel, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The rear of the monitor features a geometric, faceted design and a sturdy, angular stand that supports the monitor upright. The stand has a broad base for stability and a central support arm with a circular cutout near the bottom, likely for cable management. The monitor's exterior appears to be made primarily of matte-finished plastic, with no visible buttons, ports, or branding on any side. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a neutral gray color scheme.
description: A slim, modern computer monitor with a wide screen, thin bezel, and angular stand in matte gray plastic. The design is minimalist and unbranded, with no visible buttons or ports.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the faceted back panel and the angular stand with a circular cutout near the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the monitor's ultra-thin profile and the angled support arm of the stand.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the wide, flat screen with a thin bezel and no visible controls or branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the slimness of the monitor and the geometric stand.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, flat, and uniform in thickness, with a matte gray finish and no visible texture or decorative elements. Corners are slightly rounded, and there is no color contrast or ornamentation.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a single-piece, angular pedestal with a wide, flat base and a central support arm featuring a circular cutout near the bottom. It appears to be made of matte plastic and is designed for stability.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
